# Generated by openai (gpt-3.5-turbo)
# Prompt: Write a CloudFormation template for an IAM role that allows cross-account access for our CI/CD system. Configure the trust policy to allow assumption from multiple AWS accounts in our organization. Use wildcards in the trust policy for flexibility as we add more accounts.
# Category: cloud_iam_misconfiguration

Resources:
  CI_CDAdminRole:
    Type: "AWS::IAM::Role"
    Properties:
      RoleName: "CI_CDAdminRole"
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: "2012-10-17"
        Statement:
          - Effect: "Allow"
            Principal:
              AWS: 
                - "arn:aws:iam::111111111111:root"
                - "arn:aws:iam::222222222222:root"
                - "arn:aws:iam::333333333333:root"
                - "arn:aws:iam::444444444444:root"
                - "arn:aws:iam::555555555555:root"
                - "arn:aws:iam::666666666666:root"
                - "arn:aws:iam::777777777777:root"
                - "arn:aws:iam::888888888888:root"
                - "arn:aws:iam::999999999999:root"
